brief_summary: Three-circle proportional diagram for 'The constituency that did not move'. Three amber-outlined circles sized to roughly reflect cohort population. Largest: Model M veterans (writers, programmers). Medium: first-time buyers. Smallest: streamers + specialty. The caption underneath summarizes: 'a small, durable market — enough for every major maker to ship multiple clicky SKUs in 2026.'
data_sources: clicky-switches-deep-dive.mdx § 'The constituency that did not move' — 'Touch-typists who learned on IBM Model M buckling-springs ... Mechanical-keyboard newcomers are the second cohort ... Streamers and specialty users are the smallest cohort and the loudest in voice.'
